global_production_variables.directorial_treatment: Warm children's picture-book live-action/CG hybrid: soft practical lighting, gentle camera moves, playful physical comedy for a small black-and-white dog, cozy domestic bedtime palette, rhyme-friendly pacing with clear cause-and-effect staging.

Character_Narrator.description: Off-screen storyteller who delivers the book's rhyming narration; never appears on camera.
Character_Narrator.voice_profile: Warm adult storyteller, medium pitch, unhurried friendly pace, clear diction for rhymes, gentle smile in the voice; same voice every scene.

Character_Buster.description: Buster the Noodle Head Dog: small black-and-white dog, playful and bouncy like a frog, not very bright, expressive face, wears black-and-white pajamas later; beloved family pet.
Character_Buster.voice_profile: Small dog energy: light playful yips, soft whines, and happy pants rather than human speech; bright, quick, slightly goofy cadence; same voice every scene.

Character_Mom.description: Momma/Mom: kind adult caregiver in a cozy home, patient bedtime parent who guides Buster outside, gives treats and water, and pets him while he sleeps.
Character_Mom.voice_profile: Adult woman, warm medium pitch, calm gentle pace, soft maternal accent-neutral English, reassuring energy; same voice every scene.

Character_Daddy.description: Daddy: adult partner in Mom and Daddy's bedroom; mostly present as a sleeping/settled figure in the shared bed during Buster's bedtime climb-in.
Character_Daddy.voice_profile: Adult man, low-medium pitch, quiet sleepy energy if any sound; minimal dialogue; same voice every scene.

Loc_Home_Interior.description: Cozy family house living/entry/treat area with soft rugs, dog bowls, and warm evening lamps.
Loc_Home_Interior.visual_lock: Warm wood or painted walls, soft evening practical lamps, dog water bowl visible near treat area, front door that opens to the yard, lived-in family clutter kept gentle and child-safe; no harsh neon.

Loc_Yard_Bushes.description: Small residential outdoor yard at evening with bushes where Buster can potty.
Loc_Yard_Bushes.visual_lock: Evening outdoor light, green bushes along a fence or path, grass or dirt patch for potty, house exterior door visible for exit/return; soft twilight, not full daylight noon.

Loc_Stairs.description: Indoor staircase leading up toward the parents' bedroom.
Loc_Stairs.visual_lock: Carpeted or wood stairs with a simple banister, warm hallway lighting, upward climb toward a bedroom landing; same staircase whenever Buster goes up.

Loc_Parents_Bedroom.description: Parents' bedroom with a large bed where Buster jumps in to sleep.
Loc_Parents_Bedroom.visual_lock: Large shared bed with soft bedding, bedside lamps on low warm glow, calm night interior, enough room for a small dog to jump onto the bed; cozy 'home sweet home' feeling.

Loc_Dreamscape.description: Soft dream space of fluffy snow and a yard with running bunnies for Buster to chase.
Loc_Dreamscape.visual_lock: Slightly softer, brighter, floating dream look; fluffy snow drifts and an open yard with bunnies; Buster remains the same small black-and-white dog; no hard real-world furniture.

music_bed.style_description: Light playful children's underscore with soft piano and pizzicato strings.

production_notes: Curious bounce into affectionate humor.
Curious bounce into affectionate humor.
Curious bounce into affectionate humor.
